CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26370, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYFIELD, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL A. IND/DBA BROTHERS AUTO BODY SHOP $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,548.00, IF PARTIES AGREE TO HAVE DEFEND. REMOVE THE WOOD FROM FRONT END & PROPERLY SECURE METAL TO FIBER- GLASS & REPAIR RIGHT REAR FENDER TO WHERE TIRE DOESN'T RUB, WITHIN NEXT 60 DAYS (FROM 1-19-01), THIS SHALL BE THE ORDER OF THE COURT. IF NOT, THE JUDGM. IS FOR PLTFF FOR $1500 & COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
